OPEN-1.description: Feed count gap: 28 enabled medspa feeds, gate requires ≥30
OPEN-1.note: 5 feeds added vs 2-feed gap — 3-feed buffer accounts for any bot-blocked or 404 URLs on first pipeline run. ON CONFLICT guard prevents duplicates.

OPEN-2.description: Atom parser fix — feed-orchestrator and rss-to-signals returned 0 items from Atom feeds
OPEN-2.root_cause: Prior parseRssItems() used a combined <(?:item|entry)> regex. Atom <link href="URL"/> is a self-closing attribute tag — extractText(block, 'link') returns null on Atom entries, producing items with link=null. No format dispatcher existed to route Atom to attribute-aware extraction code.
changes_rss_to_signals: Inlined enforceEdgeFunctionEnabled() — removed ../_shared/edgeControl.ts import (MCP deployment constraint: no cross-directory imports)
Added detectFeedFormat(xml) — inspects first 500 chars for <feed root element to distinguish Atom from RSS 2.0
Added extractAtomLink(block) — handles <link href/> attribute extraction with rel precedence: alternate > any-href > self
Added parseAtomItems(feedXml) — dedicated Atom 1.0 <entry> parser using <id>, <link href>, <summary>, <content>, <published>, <updated>
Added parseRss2Items(feedXml) — RSS 2.0 <item> parser (renamed from inline logic, behavior unchanged)
Added parseFeedItems(feedXml) — format-aware dispatcher returning { items, format }
Added &#N; numeric entity decoding in extractText()
changes_feed_orchestrator: Added detectFeedFormat(xml) — same format detection logic
Added extractAtomLink(block) — Atom <link href> extraction with rel precedence
Added parseRss2Entries(feedXml) — RSS 2.0 <item> parser (renamed from prior inline logic)
Updated parseRssItems(feedXml) — now format-aware: dispatches to parseAtomEntries() or parseRss2Entries() by format
Added &#N; numeric entity decoding in extractText()
Kept all existing function signatures intact — downstream processRssFeed() calls parseRssItems() unchanged
atom_tags_handled: link[@rel=alternate][@href] (→ canonical article URL, highest priority)
link[@href] without rel (→ article URL, second priority)

files_modified.change: Atom parser + inline edgeControl + format dispatcher added
parseRssItems() now format-aware; parseAtomEntries() and extractAtomLink() added

tsc_check: Not run in this session (edge functions are Deno, not tsc scope). TypeScript in rss-to-signals and feed-orchestrator verified manually — no type-unsafe patterns introduced.
overall_note: OPEN-1 resolved: +5 medspa feeds added (28→33 projected, gate=30). OPEN-2 resolved: Atom parser added to both edge functions with format-aware dispatcher. Supabase migrations are ADD-ONLY (new file 20260313000025, no existing migrations modified).
